mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM project WHERE deleted = 0
AND project_name LIKE '%' || #{projectName} || '%'
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM project WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project (project_name, description, cover_image, status, current_step, total_steps, auto_mode, create_user_id) VALUES (#{projectName}, #{description}, #{coverImage}, #{status}, #{currentStep}, #{totalSteps}, #{autoMode}, #{createUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE project SET project_name = #{projectName}, description = #{description}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, status = #{status}, current_step = #{currentStep}, total_steps = #{totalSteps}, auto_mode = #{autoMode}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE project SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_step_material WHERE material_type = 1 AND material_id = #{scriptId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_step_material WHERE material_type = 2 AND material_id = #{actorId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_step_material WHERE material_type = 3 AND material_id = #{sceneId}
